root.desc:
Clickable Buff Tracker
Monitors the player for missing buffs outside of combat, left click to cast the buff

Soulstones are supported, right click to create soulstone, left click to apply it to self

Note: if your buff is missing and you would like it added please comment and I will endeavor to add it

init.custom:
if not aura_env.button then
    local r = aura_env.region
    aura_env.button = CreateFrame("Button", "ConsumeButton", r, "SecureActionButtonTemplate")
end

aura_env.button:SetAllPoints()
aura_env.button:RegisterForClicks("LeftButtonDown", "LeftButtonUp", "RightButtonDown", "RightButtonUp")


aura_env.button:SetAttribute("type", "macro")
if IsSpellKnown(23028) then -- Arcane Brilliance
    aura_env.button:SetAttribute("macrotext", "/cast [btn:2] Arcane Intellect; Arcane Brilliance")
else
    aura_env.button:SetAttribute("macrotext", "/cast Arcane Intellect")
end

if IsSpellKnown(47884) then -- Rank 7 creates Demonic Soulstone
    aura_env.button:SetAttribute("macrotext", "/cast [btn:2] Create Soulstone\n/use Demonic Soulstone")
elseif IsSpellKnown(27238) then -- Rank 6 creates Master Soulstone
    aura_env.button:SetAttribute("macrotext", "/cast [btn:2] Create Soulstone\n/use Master Soulstone")
elseif IsSpellKnown(20757) then -- Rank 5 creates Major Soulstone
    aura_env.button:SetAttribute("macrotext", "/cast [btn:2] Create Soulstone\n/use Major Soulstone")
elseif IsSpellKnown(20756) then -- Rank 4 creates Greater Soulstone
    aura_env.button:SetAttribute("macrotext", "/cast [btn:2] Create Soulstone\n/use Greater Soulstone")
elseif IsSpellKnown(20755) then -- Rank 3 creates Soulstone
    aura_env.button:SetAttribute("macrotext", "/cast [btn:2] Create Soulstone\n/use Soulstone")
elseif IsSpellKnown(20752) then -- Rank 2 creates Lesser Soulstone
    aura_env.button:SetAttribute("macrotext", "/cast [btn:2] Create Soulstone\n/use Lesser Soulstone")
elseif IsSpellKnown(693) then -- Rank 1 creates Minor Soulstone
    aura_env.button:SetAttribute("macrotext", "/cast [btn:2] Create Soulstone\n/use Minor Soulstone")
end
